fairness_controls.expected_action_source: select_runbook() policy output for each fault (system's own definition of correct; identical target for both arms)

chain_scoring_correction: Initial runner implementation scored solo evidence_chain at 0.55 (the deterministic harness constant), contradicting this dataset's scoring_method (solo: 1.0, 'not used to advantage either arm'). Rows and this summary are rescored to the spec; the correction adds +0.045 to every solo final_score. Nothing else changed.
fairness_controls_correction: The originally declared equal_aggregate_token_cap_per_incident=4000 was never enforced on either arm and is retracted; per-incident token usage is measured and published in every row instead. See the dataset's post_run_corrections.
